query: Deterministic integration check: reply with exactly the single token AGORA_DEMO_OK and nothing else.
error: Hosted phase 2 demo requires an auth token. Set AGORA_TEST_API_KEY, pass --auth-token, or configure AGORA_TEST_API_KEY_SECRET_NAME for Secret Manager lookup. Set AGORA_PHASE2_BOOTSTRAP_JWT (human JWT) to auto-create and store one. Hosted mode cannot auto-generate a key from API-key auth alone because /api-keys requires a human JWT session. If you want to skip hosted token requirements, run --target local.
